title: Temporary closure of Bona Vacantia switchboard number
body: "Our usual published switchboard numbers will be temporarily closed between Wednesday 24th December until Friday 2nd January 2026.  If you wish to contact any of the teams for assistance during this period of closure, you can still contact Bona Vacantia using the email addresses published on the BV homepage.  Normal service will resume on Monday 5th January 2026. "
